name: Catacombs
description:
Walking among the catacombs is quite disorienting. One dark corridor looks
like another : dry and dusty. You would become forever lost should your
torch falter. The darkness could possibly be the deadliest thing down here.
The catacombs are rumored to lead to many things, including the Wizard's den.
You chuckle at the thought of following the echos of incantations bouncing
from hall to hall. You also deduce that the lowest part of the stle's
domain must hold the dungeon. Perhaps you should keep the draft in your face so
as you do not accidentally wander into the dungeon. who knows what wanders
in that area. If you are lucky you might be able to find a exit leading to
one of the Castle's rooms.
